data.name: Pellet Auto
data.description: Balanced — picks the best model for the task type and complexity. Uses smaller models for simple tasks, larger ones for complex tasks.

data.name: Pellet Fastest
data.description: Minimum latency — prioritizes the smallest, fastest models. Great for real-time apps and simple tasks.

data.name: Pellet Cheapest
data.description: Lowest cost — selects the most cost-effective model that can handle the task.

data.name: Pellet Quality
data.description: Best output — selects the largest, most capable model. Use for complex reasoning, long-form content, or critical tasks.
